---
title: "Biological bases of beauty revisited: The effect of symmetry, averageness, and sexual dimorphism on female facial attractiveness"
authors: "Jones, A. L., & Jaeger, B."
year: 2019
date: 2019-01-01
pub-journal: "Symmetry"
volume: "11(2)"
pages: "279"
doi: "10.3390/sym11020279"
pdf: "assets/papers/2019/Jones_Jaeger_2019.pdf"
categories: [attractiveness, morphometrics]
---
